title: Arcterica nana
taxonomy: Arcterica nana is classified within the family Ranunculaceae, commonly known as the buttercup family. This family is a group of flowering plants that includes approximately 2,200 species. The classification of Arcterica nana is further divided into the order Ranunculales, which includes several other families of flowering plants. uses: Arcterica nana is known for its potential use in traditional medicine, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy. benefits: Arcterica nana, also known as the dwarf bearberry, has been used in traditional medicine for its potential health benefits. preparations: Arcterica nana is not a known plant species. However, I can provide information on the plant species Armeria maritima, also known as Sea Thrift or Arcterica maritima.
